name: Fantasy Character
description: Detailed fantasy character artwork with cinematic lighting.
prompt_prefix: detailed fantasy character, full character design, cinematic composition, dramatic lighting, intricate clothing, realistic anatomy, expressive face
prompt_suffix: highly detailed, sharp focus, atmospheric background, intricate materials, professional concept art
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, cropped head, cropped feet, deformed, distorted anatomy, incorrect proportions, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, malformed hands, duplicated limbs, extra arms, extra legs, bad face, asymmetrical eyes, watermark, text
